allow: Bash(cmd /c 'cd /d D:\\xampp-php8.5\\htdocs\\property_management_athenadorms && ren nul nul.txt 2>nul || echo rename failed')

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Athena Dorms Property Management System

PHP-based property management system with:
- User authentication and role-based access control
- Property, room, bedspace, tenant, and lease management
- Payment tracking and utility management
- Reports with PDF/Excel export
- Vercel serverless deployment configuration
- Supabase PostgreSQL database integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
